steps: Scan QR code on the Olfactory Card (using any smart phone) and the camera function (they automatically recognize QR codes) (Note: For people without access to a smart-phone there will be an automated call-in center that will provide voice prompts for choices of scent options and will connect to the centeralized server, similar to the Apps)
Dowload 'u-Smell-it' App on iOS (Apple) or Android phone
Scan the QR-Code on the Card in the App Note: After downloading the software Steps 1-3 are not necessary for additional tests (as would usually happen in repeated testing)
Rub or scratch window #1 with finger(nail)
In app choose the best of 4 scent options (one of which is the true scent) or pick the "no scent" option
Repeat 5.1 and 5.2 for all 5 scent window
See the olfactory score follow the advice
NEXT day, or at specified interval repeat with a new card
